content:
1. Fetches articles for a given month (optionally category-filtered), performs per-article author lookups, and returns a Report dataclass with summaries plus word/article counts.
2. DB dict key assumptions and N+1 author queries; manual month-end calc; post-init mutation of Report fields.
3. Month boundary logic (used explicit if/else instead of datetime arithmetic).
4. Invalid month/year, missing authors/keys, empty results, timezone/datetime.now issues, no validation or error handling.
